enum  array_type_t {
  T_BOOLEAN = 4, T_CHAR = 5, T_BYTE = 8, T_SHORT = 9,
  T_INT = 10, T_LONG = 11
}
enum  internal_opcode_t {
  NOP = 0, ACONST_NULL = 1, ICONST_M1 = 2, ICONST_0 = 3,
  ICONST_1 = 4, ICONST_2 = 5, ICONST_3 = 6, ICONST_4 = 7,
  ICONST_5 = 8, LCONST_0 = 9, LCONST_1 = 10, FCONST_0 = 11,
  FCONST_1 = 12, FCONST_2 = 13, DCONST_0 = 14, DCONST_1 = 15,

Enumeration Type Documentation

enum array_type_t

Defines the array types used by the NEWARRAY opcode

Enumerator:
T_BOOLEAN 

Array of booleans.

T_CHAR 

Array of chars.

T_BYTE 

Array of bytes.

T_SHORT 

Array of shorts.

T_INT 

Array of integers.

T_LONG 

Array of longs.

Definition at line 34 of file opcodes.h.

enum internal_opcode_t

Internal opcodes definition

Enumerator:
NOP 

No operation.

ACONST_NULL 

Push null.

ICONST_M1 

Push integer constant -1.

ICONST_0 

Push integer constant 0.

ICONST_1 

Push integer constant 1.

ICONST_2 

Push integer constant 2.

ICONST_3 

Push integer constant 3.

ICONST_4 

Push integer constant 4.

ICONST_5 

Push integer constant 5.

LCONST_0 

Push long constant 0.

LCONST_1 

Push long constant 1.

FCONST_0 

Push float constant 0.0.

FCONST_1 

Push float constant 1.0.

FCONST_2 

Push float constant 2.0.

DCONST_0 

Push double constant 0.0.

DCONST_1 

Push double constant 1.0.

BIPUSH 

Push a byte sign-extended to an integer.

SIPUSH 

Push a short sign-extended to an integer.

LDC 

Push item from runtime constant pool using a 1-byte index.

LDC_W 

Push item from runtime constant pool using a 2-byte index.

LDC2_W 

Push double-word item from runtime constant pool.

ILOAD 

Load int from local variable.

LLOAD 

Load long from local variable.

FLOAD 

Load float from local variable.

DLOAD 

Load double from local variable.

ALOAD 

Load reference from local variable.

ILOAD_0 

Load int from the first local variable.

ILOAD_1 

Load int from the second local variable.

ILOAD_2 

Load int from the third local variable.

ILOAD_3 

Load int from the fourth local variable.

LLOAD_0 

Load long from the first local variable.

LLOAD_1 

Load long from the second local variable.

LLOAD_2 

Load long from the third local variable.

LLOAD_3 

Load long from the fourth local variable.

FLOAD_0 

Load float from the first local variable.

FLOAD_1 

Load float from the second local variable.

FLOAD_2 

Load float from the third local variable.

FLOAD_3 

Load float from the fourth local variable.

DLOAD_0 

Load double from the first local variable.

DLOAD_1 

Load double from the second local variable.

DLOAD_2 

Load double from the third local variable.

DLOAD_3 

Load double from the fourth local variable.

ALOAD_0 

Load reference from the first local variable.

ALOAD_1 

Load reference from the second local variable.

ALOAD_2 

Load reference from the third local variable.

ALOAD_3 

Load reference from the fourth local variable.

IALOAD 

Load int from array.

LALOAD 

Load long from array.

FALOAD 

Load float from array.

DALOAD 

Load double from array.

AALOAD 

Load reference from array.

BALOAD 

Load byte or boolean from array.

CALOAD 

Load char from array.

SALOAD 

Load short from array.

ISTORE 

Store int into local variable.

LSTORE 

Store long into local variable.

FSTORE 

Store float into local variable.

DSTORE 

Store double into local variable.

ASTORE 

Store reference into local variable.

ISTORE_0 

Store int into the first local variable.

ISTORE_1 

Store int into the second local variable.

ISTORE_2 

Store int into the third local variable.

ISTORE_3 

Store int into the fourth local variable.

LSTORE_0 

Store long into the first local variable.

LSTORE_1 

Store long into the second local variable.

LSTORE_2 

Store long into the third local variable.

LSTORE_3 

Store long into the fourth local variable.

FSTORE_0 

Store float into the first local variable.

FSTORE_1 

Store float into the second local variable.

FSTORE_2 

Store float into the third local variable.

FSTORE_3 

Store float into the fourth local variable.

DSTORE_0 

Store double into the first local variable.

DSTORE_1 

Store double into the second local variable.

DSTORE_2 

Store double into the third local variable.

DSTORE_3 

Store double into the fourth local variable.

ASTORE_0 

Store reference into the first local variable.

ASTORE_1 

Store reference into the second local variable.

ASTORE_2 

Store reference into the third local variable.

ASTORE_3 

Store reference into the fourth local variable.

IASTORE 

Store into int array.

LASTORE 

Store into long array.

FASTORE 

Store into float array.

DASTORE 

Store into double array.

AASTORE 

Store into reference array.

BASTORE 

Store into byte array.

CASTORE 

Store into char array.

SASTORE 

Store into short array.

POP 

Pop the top operand stack value.

POP2 

Pop the one or two top operand stack values.

DUP 

Duplicate the top operand stack value.

DUP_X1 

Duplicate the top operand stack value and insert two values down.

DUP_X2 

Duplicate the top operand stack value and insert two or three values down.

DUP2 

Duplicate the top operand stack value and insert two or three values down*/.

DUP2_X1 

Duplicate the top one or two operand stack values and insert two or three values down*/.

DUP2_X2 

Duplicate the top one or two operand stack values and insert two, three, or four values down.

SWAP 

Swap the top two operand stack values.

IADD 

Add int.

LADD 

Add long.

FADD 

Add float.

DADD 

Add double.

ISUB 

Substract int.

LSUB 

Substract long.

FSUB 

Substract float.

DSUB 

Sustract double.

IMUL 

Multiply int.

LMUL 

Multiply long.

FMUL 

Multiply float.

DMUL 

Multiply double.

IDIV 

Divide int.

LDIV 

Divide long.

FDIV 

Divide float.

DDIV 

Divide double.

IREM 

Remainder int.

LREM 

Remainder long.

FREM 

Remainder float.

DREM 

Remainder double.

INEG 

Negate int.

LNEG 

Negate long.

FNEG 

Negate float.

DNEG 

Negate double.

ISHL 

Shift left int.

LSHL 

Shift left long.

ISHR 

Arithmetic shift right int.

LSHR 

Arithmetic shift right long.

IUSHR 

Logical shift right int.

LUSHR 

Logical shift right long.

IAND 

Boolean AND int.

LAND 

Boolean AND long.

IOR 

Boolean OR int.

LOR 

Boolean OR long.

IXOR 

Boolean XOR int.

LXOR 

Boolean XOR long.

IINC 

Increment local variable by constant.

I2L 

Convert int to long.

I2F 

Convert int to float.

I2D 

Convert int to double.

L2I 

Convert long to int.

L2F 

Convert long to float.

L2D 

Convert long to double.

F2I 

Convert float to int.

F2L 

Convert float to long.

F2D 

Convert float to double.

D2I 

Convert double to int.

D2L 

Convert double to long.

D2F 

Convert double to float.

I2B 

Convert int to byte.

I2C 

Convert int to char.

I2S 

Convert int to short.

LCMP 

Long compare.

FCMPL 

Float compare NaN negative.

FCMPG 

Float compare NaN positive.

DCMPL 

Double compare NaN negative.

DCMPG 

Double compare NaN positive.

IFEQ 

Branch if equal to zero.

IFNE 

Branch if not equal to zero.

IFLT 

Branch if lower than zero.

IFGE 

Branch if greater or equal to zero.

IFGT 

Branch if greater than zero.

IFLE 

Branch if lower or equal to zero.

IF_ICMPEQ 

Branch if equal.

IF_ICMPNE 

Branch if not equal.

IF_ICMPLT 

Branch if lower than.

IF_ICMPGE 

Branch if greater or equal.

IF_ICMPGT 

Branch if greater than.

IF_ICMPLE 

Branch if lower or equal.

IF_ACMPEQ 

Branch if reference equal.

IF_ACMPNE 

Branch if reference not equal.

GOTO 

Branch always.

LDC_REF 

Load a string or class constant reference.

LDC_W_REF 

Load a string or class constant reference.

TABLESWITCH 

Access jump table by index and jump.

LOOKUPSWITCH 

Access jump table by key match and jump.

IRETURN 

Return int from method.

LRETURN 

Return long from method.

FRETURN 

Return float from method.

DRETURN 

Return double from method.

ARETURN 

Return reference from method.

RETURN 

Return void from method.

GETSTATIC_PRELINK 

Prelink get static field from class.

PUTSTATIC_PRELINK 

Prelink set static field in class.

GETFIELD_PRELINK 

Prelink fetch field from object.

PUTFIELD_PRELINK 

Prelink set field in object.

INVOKEVIRTUAL 

Invoke virtual method.

INVOKESPECIAL 

Invoke special instance method.

INVOKESTATIC 

Invoke a (class) static method.

INVOKEINTERFACE 

Invoke interface method.

INVOKESUPER 

Implements the super() call semantics of INVOKESPECIAL.

NEW 

Create new object.

NEWARRAY 

Create new array.

ANEWARRAY 

Create new array of reference.

ARRAYLENGTH 

Get length of array.

ATHROW 

Throw exception or error.

CHECKCAST 

Check whethever object is of given type.

INSTANCEOF 

Determine if object is of given type.

MONITORENTER 

Enter monitor for object.

MONITOREXIT 

Monitor exit.

WIDE 

Extend local variable index by additional bytes.

MULTIANEWARRAY 

Create new multidimensional array.

IFNULL 

Branch if reference is null.

IFNONNULL 

Branch if reference is not null.

GOTO_W 

Branch always wide index.

GETSTATIC_BYTE 

Gets a byte-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_BOOL 

Gets a bool-typed static field (same as GETSTATIC_BYTE).

GETSTATIC_CHAR 

Gets a char-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_SHORT 

Gets a short-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_INT 

Gets an int-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_FLOAT 

Gets a float-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_LONG 

Gets a long-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_DOUBLE 

Gets a double-typed static field.

GETSTATIC_REFERENCE 

Gets a reference-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_BYTE 

Sets a byte-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_BOOL 

Sets a bool-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_CHAR 

Sets a char-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_SHORT 

Sets a short-typed static field (same as PUTSTATIC_CHAR).

PUTSTATIC_INT 

Sets an int-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_FLOAT 

Sets a float-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_LONG 

Sets a long-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_DOUBLE 

Sets a double-typed static field.

PUTSTATIC_REFERENCE 

Sets a reference-typed static field.

GETFIELD_BYTE 

Gets a byte-typed field.

GETFIELD_BOOL 

Gets a bool-typed field.

GETFIELD_CHAR 

Gets a char-typed field.

GETFIELD_SHORT 

Gets a short-typed field.

GETFIELD_INT 

Gets an int-typed field.

GETFIELD_FLOAT 

Gets a float-typed field.

GETFIELD_LONG 

Gets a long-typed field.

GETFIELD_DOUBLE 

Gets a double-typed field.

GETFIELD_REFERENCE 

Gets a reference-typed field.

PUTFIELD_BYTE 

Sets a byte-typed field.

PUTFIELD_BOOL 

Sets a bool-typed field.

PUTFIELD_CHAR 

Sets a char-typed field.

PUTFIELD_SHORT 

Sets a short-typed field (same as PUTFIELD_CHAR).

PUTFIELD_INT 

Sets an int-typed field.

PUTFIELD_FLOAT 

Sets a float-typed field.

PUTFIELD_LONG 

Sets a long-typed field.

PUTFIELD_DOUBLE 

Sets a double-typed field.

PUTFIELD_REFERENCE 

Sets a reference-typedef field.

INVOKEVIRTUAL_PRELINK 

Link a virtual method.

INVOKESPECIAL_PRELINK 

Link a special method.

INVOKESTATIC_PRELINK 

Link a static method.

INVOKEINTERFACE_PRELINK 

Link an interface method.

NEW_PRELINK 

Link a class to be created.

NEWARRAY_PRELINK 

Links an array class to be created.

ANEWARRAY_PRELINK 

Links an array class to be created.

CHECKCAST_PRELINK 

Links classes requested by a checkcast.

INSTANCEOF_PRELINK 

Links the class requested by an instanceof.

MULTIANEWARRAY_PRELINK 

Links classes requested by a MULTIANEWARRAY.

MONITORENTER_SPECIAL 

Modified MONITORENTER for synchronized virtual methods.

MONITORENTER_SPECIAL_STATIC 

Modified MONITORENTER for synchronized static methods.

IRETURN_MONITOREXIT 

Returns an int and releases the current monitor.

LRETURN_MONITOREXIT 

Returns a long and releases the current monitor.

FRETURN_MONITOREXIT 

Returns a float and releases the current monitor.

DRETURN_MONITOREXIT 

Returns a double and releases the current monitor.

ARETURN_MONITOREXIT 

Returns a reference and releases the current monitor.

RETURN_MONITOREXIT 

Returns and releases the current monitor.

NEW_FINALIZER 

Same as new but for finalizable objects.

LDC_PRELINK 

Links a load constant opcode.

LDC_W_PRELINK 

Links a load constant wide opcode.

METHOD_LOAD 

Loads a method code.

METHOD_ABSTRACT 

Dummy opcode for triggering abstract method errors.

INVOKE_NATIVE 

Invoke a native method.

HALT 

Halt the exection of the interpreter.

Definition at line 52 of file opcodes.h.

enum java_opcode_t

Java opcodes definition

Enumerator:
JAVA_NOP 

No operation.

JAVA_ACONST_NULL 

Push null.

JAVA_ICONST_M1 

Push integer constant -1.

JAVA_ICONST_0 

Push integer constant 0.

JAVA_ICONST_1 

Push integer constant 1.

JAVA_ICONST_2 

Push integer constant 2.

JAVA_ICONST_3 

Push integer constant 3.

JAVA_ICONST_4 

Push integer constant 4.

JAVA_ICONST_5 

Push integer constant 5.

JAVA_LCONST_0 

Push long constant 0.

JAVA_LCONST_1 

Push long constant 1.

JAVA_FCONST_0 

Push float constant 0.0.

JAVA_FCONST_1 

Push float constant 1.0.

JAVA_FCONST_2 

Push float constant 2.0.

JAVA_DCONST_0 

Push double constant 0.0.

JAVA_DCONST_1 

Push double constant 1.0.

JAVA_BIPUSH 

Push a byte sign-extended to an integer.

JAVA_SIPUSH 

Push a short sign-extended to an integer.

JAVA_LDC 

Push item from runtime constant pool using a 1-byte index.

JAVA_LDC_W 

Push item from runtime constant pool using a 2-byte index.

JAVA_LDC2_W 

Push double-word item from runtime constant pool.

JAVA_ILOAD 

Load int from local variable.

JAVA_LLOAD 

Load long from local variable.

JAVA_FLOAD 

Load float from local variable.

JAVA_DLOAD 

Load double from local variable.

JAVA_ALOAD 

Load reference from local variable.

JAVA_ILOAD_0 

Load int from the first local variable.

JAVA_ILOAD_1 

Load int from the second local variable.

JAVA_ILOAD_2 

Load int from the third local variable.

JAVA_ILOAD_3 

Load int from the fourth local variable.

JAVA_LLOAD_0 

Load long from the first local variable.

JAVA_LLOAD_1 

Load long from the second local variable.

JAVA_LLOAD_2 

Load long from the third local variable.

JAVA_LLOAD_3 

Load long from the fourth local variable.

JAVA_FLOAD_0 

Load float from the first local variable.

JAVA_FLOAD_1 

Load float from the second local variable.

JAVA_FLOAD_2 

Load float from the third local variable.

JAVA_FLOAD_3 

Load float from the fourth local variable.

JAVA_DLOAD_0 

Load double from the first local variable.

JAVA_DLOAD_1 

Load double from the second local variable.

JAVA_DLOAD_2 

Load double from the third local variable.

JAVA_DLOAD_3 

Load double from the fourth local variable.

JAVA_ALOAD_0 

Load reference from the first local variable.

JAVA_ALOAD_1 

Load reference from the second local variable.

JAVA_ALOAD_2 

Load reference from the third local variable.

JAVA_ALOAD_3 

Load reference from the fourth local variable.

JAVA_IALOAD 

Load int from array.

JAVA_LALOAD 

Load long from array.

JAVA_FALOAD 

Load float from array.

JAVA_DALOAD 

Load double from array.

JAVA_AALOAD 

Load reference from array.

JAVA_BALOAD 

Load byte or boolean from array.

JAVA_CALOAD 

Load char from array.

JAVA_SALOAD 

Load short from array.

JAVA_ISTORE 

Store int into local variable.

JAVA_LSTORE 

Store long into local variable.

JAVA_FSTORE 

Store float into local variable.

JAVA_DSTORE 

Store double into local variable.

JAVA_ASTORE 

Store reference into local variable.

JAVA_ISTORE_0 

Store int into the first local variable.

JAVA_ISTORE_1 

Store int into the second local variable.

JAVA_ISTORE_2 

Store int into the third local variable.

JAVA_ISTORE_3 

Store int into the fourth local variable.

JAVA_LSTORE_0 

Store long into the first local variable.

JAVA_LSTORE_1 

Store long into the second local variable.

JAVA_LSTORE_2 

Store long into the third local variable.

JAVA_LSTORE_3 

Store long into the fourth local variable.

JAVA_FSTORE_0 

Store float into the first local variable.

JAVA_FSTORE_1 

Store float into the second local variable.

JAVA_FSTORE_2 

Store float into the third local variable.

JAVA_FSTORE_3 

Store float into the fourth local variable.

JAVA_DSTORE_0 

Store double into the first local variable.

JAVA_DSTORE_1 

Store double into the second local variable.

JAVA_DSTORE_2 

Store double into the third local variable.

JAVA_DSTORE_3 

Store double into the fourth local variable.

JAVA_ASTORE_0 

Store reference into the first local variable.

JAVA_ASTORE_1 

Store reference into the second local variable.

JAVA_ASTORE_2 

Store reference into the third local variable.

JAVA_ASTORE_3 

Store reference into the fourth local variable.

JAVA_IASTORE 

Store into int array.

JAVA_LASTORE 

Store into long array.

JAVA_FASTORE 

Store into float array.

JAVA_DASTORE 

Store into double array.

JAVA_AASTORE 

Store into reference array.

JAVA_BASTORE 

Store into byte array.

JAVA_CASTORE 

Store into char array.

JAVA_SASTORE 

Store into short array.

JAVA_POP 

Pop the top operand stack value.

JAVA_POP2 

Pop the one or two top operand stack values.

JAVA_DUP 

Duplicate the top operand stack value.

JAVA_DUP_X1 

Duplicate the top operand stack value and insert two values down.

JAVA_DUP_X2 

Duplicate the top operand stack value and insert two or three values down.

JAVA_DUP2 

Duplicate the top operand stack value and insert two or three values down*/.

JAVA_DUP2_X1 

Duplicate the top one or two operand stack values and insert two or three values down*/.

JAVA_DUP2_X2 

Duplicate the top one or two operand stack values and insert two, three, or four values down.

JAVA_SWAP 

Swap the top two operand stack values.

JAVA_IADD 

Add int.

JAVA_LADD 

Add long.

JAVA_FADD 

Add float.

JAVA_DADD 

Add double.

JAVA_ISUB 

Substract int.

JAVA_LSUB 

Substract long.

JAVA_FSUB 

Substract float.

JAVA_DSUB 

Sustract double.

JAVA_IMUL 

Multiply int.

JAVA_LMUL 

Multiply long.

JAVA_FMUL 

Multiply float.

JAVA_DMUL 

Multiply double.

JAVA_IDIV 

Divide int.

JAVA_LDIV 

Divide long.

JAVA_FDIV 

Divide float.

JAVA_DDIV 

Divide double.

JAVA_IREM 

Remainder int.

JAVA_LREM 

Remainder long.

JAVA_FREM 

Remainder float.

JAVA_DREM 

Remainder double.

JAVA_INEG 

Negate int.

JAVA_LNEG 

Negate long.

JAVA_FNEG 

Negate float.

JAVA_DNEG 

Negate double.

JAVA_ISHL 

Shift left int.

JAVA_LSHL 

Shift left long.

JAVA_ISHR 

Arithmetic shift right int.

JAVA_LSHR 

Arithmetic shift right long.

JAVA_IUSHR 

Logical shift right int.

JAVA_LUSHR 

Logical shift right long.

JAVA_IAND 

Boolean AND int.

JAVA_LAND 

Boolean AND long.

JAVA_IOR 

Boolean OR int.

JAVA_LOR 

Boolean OR long.

JAVA_IXOR 

Boolean XOR int.

JAVA_LXOR 

Boolean XOR long.

JAVA_IINC 

Increment local variable by constant.

JAVA_I2L 

Convert int to long.

JAVA_I2F 

Convert int to float.

JAVA_I2D 

Convert int to double.

JAVA_L2I 

Convert long to int.

JAVA_L2F 

Convert long to float.

JAVA_L2D 

Convert long to double.

JAVA_F2I 

Convert float to int.

JAVA_F2L 

Convert float to long.

JAVA_F2D 

Convert float to double.

JAVA_D2I 

Convert double to int.

JAVA_D2L 

Convert double to long.

JAVA_D2F 

Convert double to float.

JAVA_I2B 

Convert int to byte.

JAVA_I2C 

Convert int to char.

JAVA_I2S 

Convert int to short.

JAVA_LCMP 

Long compare.

JAVA_FCMPL 

Float compare NaN negative.

JAVA_FCMPG 

Float compare NaN positive.

JAVA_DCMPL 

Double compare NaN negative.

JAVA_DCMPG 

Double compare NaN positive.

JAVA_IFEQ 

Branch if equal to zero.

JAVA_IFNE 

Branch if not equal to zero.

JAVA_IFLT 

Branch if lower than zero.

JAVA_IFGE 

Branch if greater or equal to zero.

JAVA_IFGT 

Branch if greater than zero.

JAVA_IFLE 

Branch if lower or equal to zero.

JAVA_IF_ICMPEQ 

Branch if equal.

JAVA_IF_ICMPNE 

Branch if not equal.

JAVA_IF_ICMPLT 

Branch if lower than.

JAVA_IF_ICMPGE 

Branch if greater or equal.

JAVA_IF_ICMPGT 

Branch if greater than.

JAVA_IF_ICMPLE 

Branch if lower or equal.

JAVA_IF_ACMPEQ 

Branch if reference equal.

JAVA_IF_ACMPNE 

Branch if reference not equal.

JAVA_GOTO 

Branch always.

JAVA_JSR 

Jump to subroutine.

JAVA_RET 

Return from subroutine.

JAVA_TABLESWITCH 

Access jump table by index and jump.

JAVA_LOOKUPSWITCH 

Access jump table by key match and jump.

JAVA_IRETURN 

Return int from method.

JAVA_LRETURN 

Return long from method.

JAVA_FRETURN 

Return float from method.

JAVA_DRETURN 

Return double from method.

JAVA_ARETURN 

Return reference from method.

JAVA_RETURN 

Return void from method.

JAVA_GETSTATIC 

Get static field from class.

JAVA_PUTSTATIC 

Set static field in class.

JAVA_GETFIELD 

Fetch field from object.

JAVA_PUTFIELD 

Set field in object.

JAVA_INVOKEVIRTUAL 

Invoke virtual method.

JAVA_INVOKESPECIAL 

Invoke special instance method.

JAVA_INVOKESTATIC 

Invoke a (class) static method.

JAVA_INVOKEINTERFACE 

Invoke interface method.

JAVA_NEW 

Create new object.

JAVA_NEWARRAY 

Create new array.

JAVA_ANEWARRAY 

Create new array of reference.

JAVA_ARRAYLENGTH 

Get length of array.

JAVA_ATHROW 

Throw exception or error.

JAVA_CHECKCAST 

Check whethever object is of given type.

JAVA_INSTANCEOF 

Determine if object is of given type.

JAVA_MONITORENTER 

Enter monitor for object.

JAVA_MONITOREXIT 

Monitor exit.

JAVA_WIDE 

Extend local variable index by additional bytes.

JAVA_MULTIANEWARRAY 

Create new multidimensional array.

JAVA_IFNULL 

Branch if reference is null.

JAVA_IFNONNULL 

Branch if reference is not null.

JAVA_GOTO_W 

Branch always wide index.

JAVA_JSR_W 

Branch to subrouting wide index.
